message:
chore: regenerate conformance / CVE-arena / release fixtures

Refresh auto-generated reports for the latest landed work:
- the libc.map straggler-export commit (`feat(string_abi,libc.map): route explicit_memset through ABI memset + add memset_explicit alias + export missing BSD/Linux stragglers`) added 10 symbols (consttime_bcmp/consttime_memequal, explicit_memset/memset_explicit, reallocarr, pidfile_signal, futex_waitv/wake/wait/requeue) to the classified surface
- the stdlib_abi correctness fixes (reallocarr size==0 → EINVAL, pidfile_signal errno-return semantics) change a handful of CVE-arena trace timings

Counts:
- total_exported: 4109 → 4119 (+10)
- the +10 are all `Implemented` (Rust-owned, native semantics)

Files:

* support_matrix.json — `total_exported` bumped 4109 → 4119; new symbol rows for the 10 newly-classified entries (consttime_bcmp, consttime_memequal in string_abi; reallocarr, pidfile_signal in stdlib_abi; explicit_memset/memset_explicit in string_abi; futex_waitv, futex_wake, futex_wait, futex_requeue in unistd_abi). Each row carries strict_semantics + hardened_semantics text describing the contract.

* tests/conformance/*.json — regenerated reports:
  - alien_cs_e2e_report.v1.json + alien_cs_e2e_trace.v1.jsonl — alien-CS e2e snapshot updated
  - callthrough_census, closure_sweep_report, conformance_coverage_snapshot, cross_report_consistency, fixture_pipeline (large diff for per-symbol rows on the 10 new exports), fixture_unit_tests, fuzz_harness_architecture, fuzz_membrane_validation, fuzz_phase1_targets, fuzz_phase2_targets, perf_regression_prevention, reverse_round_contracts, stub_census, symbol_tiers_roadmap, symbol_universe_normalization — all refreshed against the wider classified surface

* tests/cve_arena/results/** — re-run artifacts for every checked-in CVE arena scenario (bd-13ya, bd-146t, bd-15n.2, bd-18qq.4, bd-1f35, bd-1qy, bd-24b6, bd-24ug, bd-2xp3, bd-ahjd) plus the cross-cutting validation reports (corpus_normalization, format_string_validation, heap_overflow_validation, integer_overflow_validation, paired_mode_evidence, uaf_validation). Diffs include trace.jsonl record additions, artifact_index.json hash updates, and `Finished test profile in X.XXs` timing fluctuations in stderr.txt.

* tests/release/dossier_validation_report.v1.json — release-dossier counts re-derived against the new surface.

* tests/runtime_math/{admission_gate_report,controller_ablation_report,controller_manifest}.v1.json — runtime-math controller telemetry re-snapshotted.

No source-of-truth bits change here — purely auto-generated downstream reports catching up to the new ABI surface and the stdlib correctness fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
